verdict: Excellent vocal syncopation and rhythmic variety, but severely flawed by a mandatory 3-panel hold (hand) at 59.094, which is inappropriate for an Easy chart.

issues.problem: Overlapping hold notes on U, R, and D create a 3-panel hold starting at 59.094. This requires a hand/knee to execute without dropping a hold, which is a major charting error for an Easy difficulty.
